Discount Calculator

Calculate how much you save with a discount. Enter the original price and discount percentage.

FAQ

How to calculate discount?

Sale Price = Original Price × (1 - Discount%/100). For 30% off $100: $100 × 0.70 = $70.

How to calculate original price from sale price?

Original Price = Sale Price / (1 - Discount%/100). If sale price is $70 at 30% off: $70 / 0.70 = $100.
